title: Shaderless Fullbright
description: Fullbright without mods or shaders. Compatible with everything.
body:
This resource pack uses emissive block models to simulate fullbright without using any shaders. As a result, it's compatible with vanilla, Sodium, Optifine, or pretty much anything.

![Shaderless Fullbright at night.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5bPSVqUN/images/34e148fd0527fdcb95b4ac9d8ca1f8490757f7b9.png)
